name: HealthReferral
privacy_notes: consent.patientParticipantId is a patient identifier — treat as PHI
consent.consentDocRef links to a signed consent artifact — restrict to referral parties and auditors
referralNote.credentialScope gates the clinical referral note — restrict to credentialed parties only
referralNote.priorResultRefs link to clinical results — treat as PHI
consent.clinicalJustification (class C) may contain clinical detail — treat as PHI
